channel.title: Intro on Bathysphere.org
channel.description: Recent content in Intro on Bathysphere.org

item.title: Bathysphere.org
item.description: Infrequently-updated posts by Edwin Young (a software engineer, not the better-known Baptist preacher). I currently work at Microsoft on Azure, but this is a personal, unofficial site. Most images on this site are generated using a side-project of mine, https://fract4d.github.io/gnofract4d
